  buttonSearch: '[data-header-menu-ui="template-ag-menu-open-trigger"]',

  avatarWrapper: '[data-header-avatar-state]',

};

const focusableSelector = 'a[href], area[href], input:not([disabled]), button:not([disabled]), object, embed, [tabindex="0"], [contenteditable]';

const header = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.header);
const headerInner = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.headerInner);

const languageOverlay = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.languageOverlay);

const searchButton = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.buttonSearch);
const isLayoutTemplateAg = !!searchButton;

const debounce = (fn, ms) => {
  let timeoutId = null;

  return function () {
    window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    timeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
      fn.apply(this, arguments);
    }, ms);
  };
};

const delay = async (delayTime = 0) => {
  await new Promise(function (resolve) {
    setTimeout(() => {
      resolve();
    }, delayTime);
  });
};

// * Machine translation RTL
const isRightToLeft = () => {
  const DIR_RTL_LANG_LIST = window.MetroTokyo.Config.MachineTranslationDirRtlLangList || [];
  const getTLang = () => {
    const userCode = window.MetroTokyo.Config.MachineTranslationUserCode || '';
    return new window.MetroTokyo.Class.CookieUtility().getValue(`${userCode}_TLANG`);
  };
  return DIR_RTL_LANG_LIST.includes(getTLang());
};

// * Language
const {

} = (function () {
  const INITIAL_ITEM_COUNT = 6;

  const headerMutationObserver = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
    mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
      if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && (mutation.attributeName === 'data-header-position' || mutation.attributeName === 'data-header-is-show')) {

      headerMutationObserver.observe(header, { attributes: true });
      document.body.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('header-ag-menu-action', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, detail: { action: 'close', target: 'all' } }));
    } else {
      languageMenu.dataset.headerLanguageState = 'open';
      languageMenu.hidden = false;
      const containerHeight = languageMenu.scrollHeight;
      languageMenu.style.height = '0px';
      await delay(0);
      languageMenu.style.height = `${containerHeight}px`;

  };

  const close = async () => {
    languageButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');

    if (device === 'pc') {
      languageMenu.dataset.headerLanguageState = 'close';
      languageButton.focus();
      headerMutationObserver.disconnect();

    } else {
      languageMenu.dataset.headerLanguageState = 'close';
      languageMenu.style.height = `${languageMenu.offsetHeight}px`;
      await delay(0);
      languageMenu.style.height = '0px';
    }
  };

  const focusFirstItem = () => {
    const focusableElements = Array.from(languageMenu.querySelectorAll(focusableSelector)).filter((el) => {
      return el.offsetParent !== null;
    });
    const firstFocusableElement = focusableElements[0];
    firstFocusableElement.focus();
  };

  const showInitialItem = () => {
    const languageMachineItems = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.languageMachineItem);

    if (languageMachineTranslationMore) {
      languageMachineTranslationMore.hidden = false;
    }

    languageMachineItems.forEach((item, index) => {
      if (index < INITIAL_ITEM_COUNT) {
        item.hidden = false;
      } else {
        item.hidden = true;
      }
    });
  };

  const showAllItem = () => {
    const height = languageMenuBody.offsetHeight;
    languageMenuBody.style.height = height + 'px';
    languageMenuBody.dataset.headerLanguageMenuBodyState = 'running';
    languageMachineTranslationMore.hidden = true;

    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.languageMachineItem).forEach((item, index) => {
      item.hidden = false;
      if (index === INITIAL_ITEM_COUNT) {
        item.querySelectorAll(focusableSelector)[0].focus();
      }
    });

    const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(languageMenuBody);
    const maxHeight = parseFloat(computedStyle.maxHeight);
    const scrollHeight = languageMenuBody.scrollHeight;
    languageMenuBody.style.height = (isNaN(maxHeight) ? scrollHeight : Math.min(maxHeight, scrollHeight)) + 'px';
  };

  const handleClick = (e) => {

    const closeTrigger = e.target.closest(selector.languageClose);

  const handleMenuTransitionEnd = (e) => {

    }

    if (e.target.dataset.headerLanguageState === 'close') {
      e.target.hidden = true;
    }

    e.target.style.height = '';

  const handleMenuKeyDown = (e) => {
    if (device !== 'pc') return;

    const { key, shiftKey } = e;

    if (key === 'Escape') {
      close();
      return;
    }

    const focusableElements = Array.from(languageMenu.querySelectorAll(focusableSelector)).filter((el) => {
      return el.offsetParent !== null;
    });
    const firstFocusableElement = focusableElements[0];
    const lastFocusableElement = focusableElements[focusableElements.length - 1];

    if (key === 'Tab') {
      if (shiftKey) {
        if (document.activeElement === firstFocusableElement) {
          e.preventDefault();
          lastFocusableElement.focus();
        }
      } else {
        if (document.activeElement === lastFocusableElement) {
          e.preventDefault();
          firstFocusableElement.focus();

// * Menu (for SP)
const {

    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.openTrigger).forEach((el) => {
      el.hidden = false;

      el.hidden = true;
    });

  const handleClick = (e) => {

    if (header.dataset.headerMenuState === 'close') {
      menu.hidden = true;
      sBottom.hidden = true;
    }
  };

  const adjustCurrentSubmenuSpace = () => {
    const submenuLinkLists = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.submenuLinkList);

    if (device === 'pc') {
      submenu.style.paddingBottom = null;
      return;
    }

    submenuLinkLists.forEach((el) => {
      const isCurrent = el.dataset.headerMenuSubmenuCurrent === 'true';
      if (isCurrent) {
        const submenuLinkListHeight = el.offsetHeight;
        submenu.style.paddingBottom = submenuLinkListHeight + 'px';
      }
    });
  };

  const setSBottomHeight = () => {
    header.style.setProperty('--metrotokyo-header-js-height-s-bottom', `${sBottom.offsetHeight}px`);
  };

  const submenuResizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    adjustCurrentSubmenuSpace();
  });

  const sBottomResizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    setSBottomHeight();
  });

  const setResizeObserver = () => {
    submenuResizeObserver.observe(submenu);
    sBottomResizeObserver.observe(sBottom);
  };

  const unsetResizeObserver = () => {
    submenuResizeObserver.disconnect();
    sBottomResizeObserver.disconnect();
  };

  const init = () => {
    menu.hidden = true;
    sBottom.hidden = true;
    setResizeObserver();
  };

  const finalize = () => {
    close();
    menu.hidden = false;
    sBottom.hidden = false;
    adjustCurrentSubmenuSpace();
    unsetResizeObserver();
  };

  const bind = () => {
    header.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    menu.addEventListener('transitionend', handleTransitionEnd);
  };

  const unbind = () => {
    header.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    menu.removeEventListener('transitionend', handleTransitionEnd);
  };

  return { init, finalize, bind, unbind };
})();

// * Accordion (for SP)
const {
  init: initAccordion,
  finalize: finalizeAccordion,
  bind: bindAccordion,
  unbind: unbindAccordion,
} = (function () {
  const open = async (trigger) => {
    const id = trigger.getAttribute('aria-controls');
    document.body.querySelectorAll(`[aria-controls="${id}"]`).forEach((el) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
    });

    const container = document.getElementById(id);
    container.hidden = false;
    const containerHeight = container.scrollHeight;
    container.style.height = '0px';

    await delay(0);

    container.style.height = `${containerHeight}px`;
    container.dataset.headerMenuLinkListState = 'open';
  };

  const close = async (trigger) => {
    const id = trigger.getAttribute('aria-controls');
    document.body.querySelectorAll(`[aria-controls="${id}"]`).forEach((el) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    });

    const container = document.getElementById(id);

    container.dataset.headerMenuLinkListState = 'close';
    container.style.height = `${container.offsetHeight}px`;

    await delay(0);

    container.style.height = '0px';
  };

  const handleClick = (e) => {
    const trigger = e.target.closest(selector.titleButton);
    if (!trigger) return;

    if (trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'false') {
      open(trigger);
    } else {
      close(trigger);
    }
  };

  const handleMenuTransitionEnd = (e) => {
    const container = e.target;
    if (container.dataset.headerMenuLinkListState === 'close') {
      container.hidden = true;
    }
    container.style.height = '';
  };

  const reset = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.titleButton).forEach((el) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    });
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.linkList).forEach((el) => {
      el.hidden = true;
      el.dataset.headerMenuLinkListState = 'close';
    });
  };

  const init = () => {
    reset();
  };

  const finalize = () => {
    reset();
  };

  const bind = () => {
    menu.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    menu.addEventListener('transitionend', handleMenuTransitionEnd);
  };

  const unbind = () => {
    menu.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    menu.removeEventListener('transitionend', handleMenuTransitionEnd);
  };

  return { init, finalize, bind, unbind };
})();

// * Mega menu (for PC)
const {
  finalize: finalizeLv2Menu,
  bind: bindLv2Menu,
  unbind: unbindLv2Menu,
} = (function () {
  const DELAY_TIME_FAST_MS = 300;
  const DELAY_TIME_SLOW_MS = 600;
  const ANIMATION_EASING = 'cubic-bezier(0.455, 0.03, 0.515, 0.955)';

  let openTimeoutId = null;
  let closeTimeoutId = null;
  let activeMenuId;

  const animate = (element, keyframes, options) => {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      const animation = element.animate(keyframes, options);
      animation.onfinish = resolve;
    });
  };

  const fadeInAnimation = async (el) => {
    const keyframes = [{ opacity: 0 }, { opacity: 1 }];

    const options = {
      duration: 300,
      easing: ANIMATION_EASING,
    };

    await animate(el, keyframes, options);
  };

  const fadeOutAnimation = async (el) => {
    const keyframes = [{ opacity: 1 }, { opacity: 0 }];

    const options = {
      duration: 100,
      easing: ANIMATION_EASING,
    };

    await animate(el, keyframes, options);
  };

  const open = async ({ targetLinkList, animation }) => {
    activeMenuId = targetLinkList.id;

    // observe
    headerMutationObserver.observe(header, { attributes: true });

    const titleLink = targetLinkList.closest(selector.listItem).querySelector(selector.titleLink);
    titleLink.dataset.headerMenuTitleLinkState = 'open';

    targetLinkList.hidden = false;

    if (animation) await fadeInAnimation(targetLinkList);
    targetLinkList.style.opacity = 1;
  };

  const close = async ({ targetLinkList, animation }) => {
    activeMenuId = '';

    const titleLink = targetLinkList.closest(selector.listItem).querySelector(selector.titleLink);
    titleLink.dataset.headerMenuTitleLinkState = 'close';

    if (animation) await fadeOutAnimation(targetLinkList);
    targetLinkList.style.opacity = 0;

    targetLinkList.hidden = true;

    // unobserve
    headerMutationObserver.disconnect();
  };

  const clearOpenAndCloseTimeout = () => {
    window.clearTimeout(openTimeoutId);
    window.clearTimeout(closeTimeoutId);
  };

  const headerMutationObserver = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
    mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
      if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && (mutation.attributeName === 'data-header-position' || mutation.attributeName === 'data-header-is-show')) {
        if (!mutation.target.hasAttribute('data-header-is-show') && activeMenuId) {
          clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
          close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: false });
        }
      }
    });
  });

  const isHeaderShown = () => {
    return header.dataset.headerPosition === 'absolute' || header.hasAttribute('data-header-is-show');
  };

  const handleMouseOver = (e) => {
    // only for template-ag
    if (e.target.closest(selector.buttonSearch)) {
      clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
      closeTimeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
        if (activeMenuId) close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: true });
      }, DELAY_TIME_FAST_MS);
      return;
    }

    const targetListItem = e.target.closest(selector.listItem);
    if (!targetListItem) return;
    const targetLinkList = targetListItem.querySelector(selector.linkList);
    if (!targetLinkList) return;

    if (activeMenuId) {
      clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
      openTimeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
        if (targetLinkList.id === activeMenuId) return;
        close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: false });
        open({ targetLinkList: targetLinkList, animation: false });
      }, DELAY_TIME_FAST_MS);
    } else {
      clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
      openTimeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
        if (!isHeaderShown()) return;
        open({ targetLinkList: targetLinkList, animation: true });
      }, DELAY_TIME_FAST_MS);
    }
  };

  const handleMouseLeave = (e) => {
    clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
    closeTimeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
      if (activeMenuId) close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: true });
    }, DELAY_TIME_SLOW_MS);
  };

  const handleFocusIn = (e) => {
    // only for template-ag
    if (e.target.closest(selector.buttonSearch)) {
      if (activeMenuId) close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: false });
      return;
    }

    const targetListItem = e.target.closest(selector.listItem);
    if (!targetListItem) return;
    const targetLinkList = targetListItem.querySelector(selector.linkList);
    if (!targetLinkList) return;

    if (targetLinkList.id === activeMenuId) return;
    if (activeMenuId) close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: false });
    open({ targetLinkList: targetLinkList, animation: false });
  };

  const handleFocusOut = async (e) => {
    const targetListItem = e.target.closest(selector.listItem);
    if (!targetListItem) return;

    await delay(0); // wait for link element to be focused
    const hasFocus = menu.contains(document.activeElement);
    if (!hasFocus && activeMenuId) {
      clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
      close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: false });
    }
  };

  const handleClick = (e) => {
    const closeTrigger = e.target.closest(selector.linkListClose);

    if (closeTrigger) {
      clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
      close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: true });
    }
  };

  const finalize = () => {
    clearOpenAndCloseTimeout();
    if (activeMenuId) close({ targetLinkList: document.getElementById(activeMenuId), animation: false });

    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.linkList).forEach((el) => {
      el.style.opacity = null;
    });
  };

  const bind = () => {
    menu.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    menu.addEventListener('mouseover', handleMouseOver);
    menu.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave);
    menu.addEventListener('focusin', handleFocusIn);
    menu.addEventListener('focusout', handleFocusOut);
  };

  const unbind = () => {
    menu.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    menu.removeEventListener('mouseover', handleMouseOver);
    menu.removeEventListener('mouseleave', handleMouseLeave);
    menu.removeEventListener('focusin', handleFocusIn);
    menu.removeEventListener('focusout', handleFocusOut);
  };

  return { finalize, bind, unbind };
})();

// * Menu horizontal scroll (for PC)
const {
  init: initMenuScroll,
  finalize: finalizeMenuScroll,
  bind: bindMenuScroll,
  unbind: unbindMenuScroll,
} = (function () {
  const scrollAmount = 300;

  const slideToLeft = (e) => {
    const track = e.target.closest(selector.container).querySelector(selector.track);
    track.scrollLeft = track.scrollLeft - scrollAmount;
  };

  const slideToRight = (e) => {
    const track = e.target.closest(selector.container).querySelector(selector.track);
    track.scrollLeft = track.scrollLeft + scrollAmount;
  };

  const updateButtonVisibility = (container) => {
    const track = container.querySelector(selector.track);
    const prev = container.querySelector(selector.prev);
    const next = container.querySelector(selector.next);

    let isScrolledLeftEdge;
    let isScrolledRightEdge;
    const rtl = isRightToLeft();

    if (track.clientWidth === track.scrollWidth) {
      prev.hidden = true;
      next.hidden = true;
    } else {
      prev.hidden = false;
      next.hidden = false;

      if (rtl) {
        isScrolledLeftEdge = Math.abs(Math.abs(track.scrollLeft) + track.clientWidth - track.scrollWidth) <= 1;
        isScrolledRightEdge = Math.abs(track.scrollLeft) <= 1;
      } else {
        isScrolledLeftEdge = track.scrollLeft === 0;
        isScrolledRightEdge = Math.abs(track.scrollLeft + track.clientWidth - track.scrollWidth) <= 1;
      }

      if (!isScrolledLeftEdge) {
        prev.hidden = false;
        container.dataset.headerMenuHiddenPrev = 'false';
      } else if (isScrolledLeftEdge) {
        container.dataset.headerMenuHiddenPrev = 'true';
      }

      if (!isScrolledRightEdge) {
        next.hidden = false;
        container.dataset.headerMenuHiddenNext = 'false';
      } else if (isScrolledRightEdge) {
        container.dataset.headerMenuHiddenNext = 'true';
      }
    }
  };

  const setResizeObserver = (container) => {
    const handleResize = debounce(updateButtonVisibility, 200);
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      handleResize(container);
    });

    const track = container.querySelector(selector.track);
    resizeObserver.observe(track);
  };

  const handleClick = (e) => {
    const prev = e.target.closest(selector.prev);
    const next = e.target.closest(selector.next);

    if (prev) slideToLeft(e);
    if (next) slideToRight(e);
  };

  const handleTransitionEnd = (e) => {
    const container = e.target.closest(selector.container);
    const prev = e.target.closest(selector.prev);
    const next = e.target.closest(selector.next);

    if (prev && container.dataset.headerMenuHiddenPrev === 'true') {
      prev.hidden = true;
    } else if (next && container.dataset.headerMenuHiddenNext === 'true') {
      next.hidden = true;
    }
  };

  const init = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.container).forEach((container) => {
      setResizeObserver(container);
      updateButtonVisibility(container);
    });
  };

  const finalize = () => {};

  const bind = () => {
    fragmentElement.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
    fragmentElement.addEventListener('transitionend', handleTransitionEnd);
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.track).forEach((track) => {
      const container = track.closest(selector.container);
      const handleScroll = debounce(updateButtonVisibility, 200);
      track.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        handleScroll(container);
      });
    });
  };

  const unbind = () => {};

  return { init, finalize, bind, unbind };
})();

// * Submenu pull-down list
const { init: initSubmenuLinkList, finalize: finalizeSubmenuLinkList } = (function () {
  const LIST_MARGIN_INLINE_END_MIN = 24;

  const adjustSubmenuLinkListPosition = () => {
    const submenuLinkLists = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.submenuLinkList);
    const rtl = isRightToLeft();

    submenuLinkLists.forEach((el) => {
      el.style.insetInlineStart = null; // reset

      if (rtl) {
        const headerLeft = header.getBoundingClientRect().left;
        const { left } = el.getBoundingClientRect();

        if (left < headerLeft) {
          el.style.insetInlineStart = -1 * (headerLeft - left + LIST_MARGIN_INLINE_END_MIN) + 'px';
        } else if (left > headerLeft && left - headerLeft < LIST_MARGIN_INLINE_END_MIN) {
          el.style.insetInlineStart = -1 * (LIST_MARGIN_INLINE_END_MIN - (left - headerLeft)) + 'px';
        }
      } else {
        const headerRight = header.getBoundingClientRect().right;
        const { right } = el.getBoundingClientRect();

        if (right > headerRight) {
          el.style.insetInlineStart = -1 * (right - headerRight + LIST_MARGIN_INLINE_END_MIN) + 'px';
        } else if (right < headerRight && headerRight - right < LIST_MARGIN_INLINE_END_MIN) {
          el.style.insetInlineStart = -1 * (LIST_MARGIN_INLINE_END_MIN - (headerRight - right)) + 'px';
        }
      }
    });
  };

  const handleResize = debounce(adjustSubmenuLinkListPosition, 200);

  const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    handleResize();
  });

  const init = () => {
    adjustSubmenuLinkListPosition();
    resizeObserver.observe(header);
  };

  const finalize = () => {
    const submenuLinkLists = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.submenuLinkList);
    submenuLinkLists.forEach((el) => {
      el.style.insetInlineStart = null;
    });
    resizeObserver.disconnect();
  };

  return { init, finalize };
})();

// only for template-ag
// * templateAg EventDispatcher
const {
  init: initTemplateAgEventDispatcher,
  finalize: finalizeTemplateAgEventDispatcher,
  bind: bindTemplateAgEventDispatcher,
  unbind: unbindTemplateAgEventDispatcher,
} = (function () {
  const handleFocusIn = (e) => {
    triggerHeaderLgMenuAction(e.target);
  };

  const handleMouseOver = (e) => {
    triggerHeaderLgMenuAction(e.target);
  };

  const triggerHeaderLgMenuAction = (target) => {
    const targetSelector = [selector.submenuButton, selector.listItem].join(',');
    if (target.closest(targetSelector)) {
      document.body.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('header-ag-menu-action', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, detail: { action: 'close', target: 'all' } }));
    }
  };

  const init = () => {};

  const finalize = () => {};

  const bind = () => {
    header.addEventListener('focusin', handleFocusIn);
    header.addEventListener('mouseover', handleMouseOver);
  };

  const unbind = () => {
    header.removeEventListener('mouseover', handleFocusIn);
    header.removeEventListener('mouseover', handleMouseOver);
  };

  return { init, finalize, bind, unbind };
})();

// * Submenu current attribute
const setSubmenuCurrentAttribute = () => {
  const normalizeUrl = (url) => {
    let path = url === '/' ? url : url.replace(/index\.html$/, '').replace(/\/$/, '');
    return path;
  };

  const pathname = normalizeUrl(new URL(window.location.href).pathname);

  const pathList = [];
  const parts = pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean);
  for (var i = parts.length; i > 0; i--) {
    pathList.push('/' + parts.slice(0, i).join('/'));
  }

  const setCurrentAttribute = (submenuListItem, href) => {
    const regexp1 = new RegExp('^' + href + '(/|)$');
    const regexp2 = new RegExp('^' + href + '/[^/]+$');
    const testArr = [];

    const submenuLinks = Array.from(submenuListItem.querySelectorAll(selector.submenuLink + '[href^="' + href + '"]')).filter((el) => {
      testArr.push({
        elpathname: el.pathname,
        reg1: regexp1.test(el.pathname),
        reg2: regexp2.test(el.pathname),
      });
      return regexp1.test(el.pathname) || regexp2.test(el.pathname);
    });

    return Array.from(submenuLinks).some((submenuLink) => {
      if (location.origin !== submenuLink.origin) return false;

      const submenuListItem = submenuLink.closest(selector.submenuListItem);
      const isButtonCurrent = submenuListItem.querySelector(selector.submenuButton).getAttribute('aria-current') === 'page';

      let flg = false;
      let isMatch = normalizeUrl(submenuLink.pathname) === pathname;
      if (isMatch) {
        submenuLink.setAttribute('aria-current', 'page');
        submenuListItem.querySelectorAll(selector.submenuLink + '[aria-current="true"]').forEach((e) => {
          e.removeAttribute('aria-current');
        });

        flg = true;
      } else if (!isButtonCurrent) {
        const link = normalizeUrl(submenuLink.pathname);

        if (pathname.match(new RegExp('^' + link))) {
          submenuLink.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
          flg = true;
        }
      }

      if (flg) {
        if (!isButtonCurrent) submenuLink.closest(selector.submenuListItem).querySelector(selector.submenuButton).setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
        submenuLink.closest(selector.submenuListItem).querySelector(selector.submenuLinkList).setAttribute('data-header-menu-submenu-current', 'true');
      }

      return flg;
    });
  };

  fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.submenuButton).forEach((submenuButton) => {
    if (location.origin !== submenuButton.origin) return;

    const buttonPathName = normalizeUrl(submenuButton.pathname);

    if (buttonPathName === '/') return;

    if (buttonPathName === pathname) {
      submenuButton.setAttribute('aria-current', 'page');
    } else if (new RegExp('^' + buttonPathName + '/').test(pathname)) {
      submenuButton.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
    }
  });

  fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.submenuListItem).forEach((submenuListItem) => {
    pathList.some((path) => {
      const result = setCurrentAttribute(submenuListItem, path);
      return result;
    });
  });
};

// * AI avatar
const {
  init: initAvatar,
  bindSp: bindAvatarSp,
  unbindSp: unbindAvatarSp,
  bindPc: bindAvatarPc,
  unbindPc: unbindAvatarPc,
} = (() => {
  const NAME_PREFIX = '東京都AI広報アバター「都星人（とせいじん）」';
  const AVATARS = [
    { name: 'きくかめ', images: [
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-t01-png',
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-t03-png',
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-t05-png',
    ] },
    { name: 'つたねこ', images: [
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-c01-png',
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-c04-png',
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-c05-png',
    ] },
    { name: 'ふくほう', images: [
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-f01-png',
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-f04-png',
      '/documents/d/tosei/header_bureau-tokyo_avatar-f05-png',
    ] },
  ];
  const CAPTION_MARGIN_INLINE = 16;
  const CHANGE_ALLOW_DELAY = 100;
  const CHANGE_TRANSITION = 500;
  const CHANGE_NAME_TRANSITION = 300;
  const CHANGE_NAME_PLACEHOLDER = '？？？？';

  const wrapper = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.avatarWrapper);
  const button = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.avatarButton);
  const image = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.avatarImage);
  const caption = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.avatarCaption);
  const name = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.avatarName);

  const images = [];
  let currentImageIndex = 0;
  let isOpen = false;
  let canChange = false;
  let canChangeTimeoutId = null;

  const shuffleAvatars = original => {
    const avatars = original.map(item => ({
      ...item,
      images: [...item.images],
    }));

    const shuffle = a => {
      for (let i = a.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
        const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
        [a[i], a[j]] = [a[j], a[i]];
      }
      return a;
    };

    shuffle(avatars);
    avatars.forEach(avatar => {
      shuffle(avatar.images);
      avatar.i = 0;
    });

    const shuffled = [];
    let currentAvatar = 0;

    while (avatars.some(a => a.i < a.images.length)) {
      const avatar = avatars[currentAvatar];
      currentAvatar = (currentAvatar + 1) % avatars.length;

      if (avatar.i < avatar.images.length) {
        shuffled.push({
          name: avatar.name,
          image: avatar.images[avatar.i++],
        });
      }
    }

    return shuffled;
  };
  const shuffled = shuffleAvatars(AVATARS);

  const setImages = async () => {
    const f = document.createDocumentFragment();
    for (let i = 0; i < shuffled.length; i++) {
      images[i] = image.cloneNode();
      images[i].style.position = 'absolute';
      images[i].style.left = '0';
      images[i].style.top = '0';
      images[i].hidden = true;

      images[i].alt = `${NAME_PREFIX}${shuffled[i].name}`;
      images[i].src = shuffled[i].image;

      f.append(images[i]);
    }

    images[currentImageIndex].hidden = false;
    name.textContent = shuffled[currentImageIndex].name;

    image.style.visibility = 'hidden';
    button.append(f);
    await delay(0);
    wrapper.hidden = false;
  };

  const nextImage = () => {
    currentImageIndex  += 1;
    if (currentImageIndex >= shuffled.length) currentImageIndex = 0;
    return currentImageIndex;
  };

  const change = () => {
    const current = currentImageIndex;
    const next = nextImage();

    images[current].style.opacity = '0';
    images[next].hidden = false;
    setTimeout(() => {
      images[current].hidden = true;
      images[current].style.opacity = null;
    }, CHANGE_TRANSITION);

    name.textContent = CHANGE_NAME_PLACEHOLDER;
    setTimeout(() => {
      name.textContent = shuffled[next].name;
    }, CHANGE_NAME_TRANSITION);
  };

  const open = () => {
    isOpen = true;
    wrapper.dataset.headerAvatarState = 'open';
    clearTimeout(canChangeTimeoutId);
    canChangeTimeoutId = setTimeout(() => canChange = true, CHANGE_ALLOW_DELAY);
  };

  const close = () => {
    isOpen = false;
    wrapper.dataset.headerAvatarState = 'close';
    canChange = false;
    clearTimeout(canChangeTimeoutId);
    canChangeTimeoutId = null;
  };

  const adjustCaptionPosition = async () => {
    const { left: headerLeft, right: headerRight, width: headerWidth } = header.getBoundingClientRect();
    caption.style.setProperty('--header-width', `${headerWidth}px`);
    caption.style.removeProperty('--avatar-caption-offset');
    await delay(0);
    const { left, right } = caption.getBoundingClientRect();

    if (left < headerLeft + CAPTION_MARGIN_INLINE) {
      const offset = headerLeft + CAPTION_MARGIN_INLINE - left;
      caption.style.setProperty('--avatar-caption-offset', `${offset}px`);
    }
    if (right > headerRight - CAPTION_MARGIN_INLINE) {
      const offset = headerRight - CAPTION_MARGIN_INLINE - right;
      caption.style.setProperty('--avatar-caption-offset', `${offset}px`);
    }
  };

  const handleClickSp = e => {
    if (e.target.closest(selector.avatarButton)) {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (!isOpen) open();
      else if (canChange) change();
    } else if (!e.target.closest(selector.avatarWrapper)) {
      close();
    }
  };

  const handleFocusIn = e => {
    if (!isOpen) open();
  };

  const handleFocusOut = async e => {
    await delay(0);
    if (wrapper.contains(document.activeElement)) return;
    close();
  };

  const handleClickPc = e => {
    if (!canChange) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    change();
  };

  const handleResize = debounce(adjustCaptionPosition, 200);
  const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(handleResize);

  const init = () => {
    setImages();

    adjustCaptionPosition();
    resizeObserver.observe(header);
  };

  const bindSp = () => {
    document.body.addEventListener('click', handleClickSp);
    window.addEventListener('scroll', close);
  };

  const unbindSp = () => {
    close();
    document.body.removeEventListener('click', handleClickSp);
    window.removeEventListener('scroll', close);
  };

  const bindPc = () => {
    wrapper.addEventListener('pointerenter', open);
    wrapper.addEventListener('pointerleave', close);
    wrapper.addEventListener('focusin', handleFocusIn);
    wrapper.addEventListener('focusout', handleFocusOut);
    button.addEventListener('click', handleClickPc);
    window.addEventListener('scroll', close);
    window.addEventListener('blur', close);
  };

  const unbindPc = () => {
    close();
    wrapper.removeEventListener('pointerenter', open);
    wrapper.removeEventListener('pointerleave', close);
    wrapper.removeEventListener('focusin', handleFocusIn);
    wrapper.removeEventListener('focusout', handleFocusOut);
    button.removeEventListener('click', handleClickPc);
    window.removeEventListener('scroll', close);
    window.removeEventListener('blur', close);
  };

  return { init, bindSp, unbindSp, bindPc, unbindPc };
})();

// * Match media
const handleMatchMedia = () => {
  if (mediaQueryPc.matches) {
    device = 'pc';
  } else if (mediaQueryTablet.matches) {
    device = 'tablet';
  } else {
    device = 'sp';
  }

  initLanguage();

  if (mediaQueryPc.matches) {
    // PC
    finalizeMenu();
    unbindMenu();

    finalizeAccordion();
    unbindAccordion();

    initMenuScroll();
    bindMenuScroll();

    bindLv2Menu();

    initSubmenuLinkList();

    // only for template-ag
    if (isLayoutTemplateAg) {
      bindTemplateAgEventDispatcher();
    }

    unbindAvatarSp();
    bindAvatarPc();
  } else {
    // SP
    finalizeMenu();
    initMenu();
    bindMenu();

    initAccordion();
    bindAccordion();

    finalizeMenuScroll();
    unbindMenuScroll();

    finalizeLv2Menu();
    unbindLv2Menu();

    finalizeSubmenuLinkList();

    // only for template-ag
    if (isLayoutTemplateAg) {
      unbindTemplateAgEventDispatcher();
    }

    unbindAvatarPc();
    bindAvatarSp();
  }
};

// * Export to global variables
const setGlobalVariables = () => {
  const machineTranslationRoot = document.querySelector('[data-header-machine-translation-option]');
  if (!machineTranslationRoot) return;
  const optionStr = machineTranslationRoot.dataset.headerMachineTranslationOption.replace(/\s/g, '').replace(/^\{/, '{"').replace(/}$/, '"}').replace(/(,|:)/g, '"$1"');
  const option = JSON.parse(optionStr);
  window.MetroTokyo.Config.MachineTranslationUserCode = option.user_code;
};

// * Main
bindLanguage();

setGlobalVariables();
setSubmenuCurrentAttribute();
initAvatar();
handleMatchMedia();
mediaQueryPc.addEventListener('change', handleMatchMedia);
mediaQueryTablet.addEventListener('change', handleMatchMedia);

// for machine translation
const updateLanguageLink = () => {
  const kdsoriginal = document.getElementById('kdsoriginal');

  const originalSiteUrl = kdsoriginal ? kdsoriginal.getAttribute('href') : location.href;

  const machineTranslationRoot = document.querySelector('[data-header-machine-translation-option]');
  if (!machineTranslationRoot) return;
  const optionStr = machineTranslationRoot.dataset.headerMachineTranslationOption.replace(/\s/g, '').replace(/^\{/, '{"').replace(/}$/, '"}').replace(/(,|:)/g, '"$1"');
  const option = JSON.parse(optionStr);

  const links = document.body.querySelectorAll('[data-header-menu-ui="language-machine-translation-item"]:not([data-header-machine-translation-lang-code="ja"]) a');

  links.forEach((link) => {
    const href = link.getAttribute('href').replaceAll('{{HOSTNAME}}', option.hostname).replaceAll('{{USER_CODE}}', option.user_code).replace('{{LINK_URL}}', originalSiteUrl).replace('{{MSG_NO}}', option.msg_no);
    link.setAttribute('href', href);
  });

  const jaLink = document.body.querySelector('[data-header-menu-ui="language-machine-translation-item"][data-header-machine-translation-lang-code="ja"] a');
  jaLink.href = originalSiteUrl;
};

window.addEventListener(
  'DOMContentLoaded',
  () => {
    updateLanguageLink();
  },
  { passive: false, capture: false, once: true }
);;</script></div><div class="lfr-layout-structure-item-extend-session--------- lfr-layout-structure-item-3f8f983f-c9ee-906e-9f3f-55ccf5394ec8 "><div id="fragment-630f219a-3f12-b4bb-630f-1a6808664183"> <!-- extend sessionリクエストブロック --></div><script type="module">const configuration = {}; const fragmentElement = document.querySelector('#fragment-630f219a-3f12-b4bb-630f-1a6808664183'); const fragmentEntryLinkNamespace = 'rams'; const fragmentNamespace = 'rams'; const layoutMode = 'view';if (!Liferay.ThemeDisplay.isSignedIn()) {

    const blockExtendSession = function(url) {
        return url && url.includes('/c/portal/extend_session');
    };

    // fetchブロック
    if (window.fetch) {
        const originalFetch = window.fetch;
        window.fetch = function() {
            if (blockExtendSession(arguments[0])) {
                return Promise.resolve(new Response(null, { status: 204 }));
            }
            return originalFetch.apply(this, arguments);
        };
    }

    // XHRブロック
    const originalOpen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open;
    XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = function(method, url) {
        if (blockExtendSession(url)) {
            this.abort();
            return;
        }
        return originalOpen.apply(this, arguments);
    };
}

  SLIDER_NESTED: 'slider-nested',
  SWIPER_NESTED: 'swiper-nested',
  SWIPER_WRAPPER_NESTED: 'swiper-wrapper-nested',
  SLIDE_NESTED: 'slide-nested',
};

const SLIDER_STATE = {
  DISABLED: 'disabled',
  ENABLED: 'enabled',
};

const AUTOPLAY_STATE = {
  PLAY: 'play',
  PAUSE: 'pause',
};

const SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE = {
  sp: {
    width: 375,
    height: 211,
  },
  pc: {
    width: 1400,
    height: 530,
  },
};

const THUMBNAIL_IMAGE_SIZE = {
  width: 56,
  height: 56,
};

const autoplayDelay = configuration.autoplayDelay || 3000;
const autoplayDelayNested = configuration.autoplayDelayNested || 3000;

const autoplayStopEvent = new CustomEvent('ag-main-visual-autoplay', { bubbles: true, detail: { action: 'stop' } });
const autoplayStartEvent = new CustomEvent('ag-main-visual-autoplay', { bubbles: true, detail: { action: 'start' } });

const root = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.root);
const loader = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.loader);
const slider = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.slider);
const pagination = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.pagination);
const autoplayButton = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.autoplayButton);

let imageLoadPromises = [];

const createSlidesAndThumbnails = () => {
  const xmlString = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.slideData).innerHTML.trim();
  const parser = new DOMParser();
  const xmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(xmlString, 'application/xml');

  const slideData = Array.from(xmlDoc.querySelectorAll('item')).map((item) => {
    const slideItems = Array.from(item.querySelectorAll('slideitem')).map((slideItem) => ({
      imageAlt: slideItem.querySelector('imagealt')?.textContent.trim() || '',
      imageSrc: {
        s: slideItem.querySelector('imagesrc > s')?.textContent.trim() || '',
        lg: slideItem.querySelector('imagesrc > lg')?.textContent.trim() || '',
      },
    }));
    const urlElement = item.querySelector('url');

    return {
      title: item.querySelector('title')?.textContent.trim() || '',
      imageAlt: slideItems.length === 0 ? item.querySelector('imagealt')?.textContent.trim() || '' : null,
      url: urlElement?.textContent.trim() || '',
      targetBlank: urlElement?.getAttribute('target') === '_blank',
      thumbnailSrc: item.querySelector('thumbnailsrc')?.textContent.trim() || '',
      imageSrc:
        slideItems.length === 0
          ? {
              s: item.querySelector('imagesrc > s')?.textContent.trim() || '',
              lg: item.querySelector('imagesrc > lg')?.textContent.trim() || '',
            }
          : null,
      slideItems: slideItems.length > 0 ? slideItems : null,
    };
  });

  const slidesFragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
  const thumbnailsFragment = document.createDocumentFragment();

  slideData.forEach((data, index) => {
    const { title, imageAlt, imageSrc, url, targetBlank, thumbnailSrc, slideItems } = data;

    // Slide
    const slide = document.createElement('div');
    slide.id = SLIDE_ID_PREFIX + (index + 1);
    slide.className = className.slide;
    slide.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.SLIDE);
    slide.setAttribute('role', 'group');
    slide.setAttribute('aria-roledescription', ROLE_DESCRIPTION.MV);
    slide.setAttribute('aria-label', ARIA_LABEL.SLIDE + (index + 1));

    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.className = className.link;
    link.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.LINK);
    link.href = url;
    if (targetBlank) link.target = '_blank';
    link.tabIndex = -1;

    const linkText = document.createElement('span');
    linkText.className = className.linkText;
    linkText.textContent = title;

    link.appendChild(linkText);

    const createPictureElement = (imageSrc, imageAlt) => {
      const picture = document.createElement('picture');
      picture.className = className.picture;
      const source = document.createElement('source');
      source.srcset = imageSrc.s;
      source.media = PICTURE_SOURCE_MEDIA;
      source.width = SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE.sp.width;
      source.height = SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE.sp.height;
      const img = document.createElement('img');
      img.className = className.pictureImage;
      img.src = imageSrc.lg;
      img.alt = imageAlt;
      img.width = SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE.pc.width;
      img.height = SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE.pc.height;

      picture.appendChild(source);
      picture.appendChild(img);

      const promise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        img.onload = () => resolve();
        img.onerror = () => reject(new Error(`Failed to load image: ${imageSrc}`));
      });
      imageLoadPromises.push(promise);

      return picture;
    };

    if (slideItems) {
      // Slide Nested
      const sliderNested = document.createElement('div');
      sliderNested.className = className.sliderNested;
      sliderNested.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.SLIDER_NESTED);
      sliderNested.setAttribute('role', 'group');
      sliderNested.setAttribute('aria-roledescription', `${title} スライダー`);

      const swiperNested = document.createElement('div');
      swiperNested.className = className.swiper;
      swiperNested.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.SWIPER_NESTED);

      const swiperWrapperNested = document.createElement('div');
      swiperWrapperNested.className = className.swiperWrapper;
      swiperWrapperNested.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.SWIPER_WRAPPER_NESTED);

      const slidesNestedFragment = document.createDocumentFragment();

      slideItems.forEach((slideItem, slideIndex) => {
        const { imageSrc, imageAlt } = slideItem;

        const slideNested = document.createElement('div');
        slideNested.className = className.slide;
        slideNested.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.SLIDE_NESTED);
        slideNested.setAttribute('role', 'group');
        slideNested.setAttribute('aria-roledescription', title);
        slideNested.setAttribute('aria-label', ARIA_LABEL.SLIDE + (slideIndex + 1));

        const picture = createPictureElement(imageSrc, imageAlt ? imageAlt : '');
        slideNested.appendChild(picture);

        slidesNestedFragment.appendChild(slideNested);
      });

      swiperWrapperNested.appendChild(slidesNestedFragment);
      swiperNested.appendChild(swiperWrapperNested);
      sliderNested.appendChild(swiperNested);
      link.appendChild(sliderNested);
    } else {
      const picture = createPictureElement(imageSrc, imageAlt ? imageAlt : '');
      link.appendChild(picture);
    }

    slide.appendChild(link);

    slidesFragment.appendChild(slide);

    // Thumbnail
    const thumbnail = document.createElement('button');
    thumbnail.className = className.thumbnail;
    thumbnail.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.THUMBNAIL);
    thumbnail.setAttribute('aria-controls', SLIDE_ID_PREFIX + (index + 1));
    if (index === 0) {
      thumbnail.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
      thumbnail.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
    }
    thumbnail.type = 'button';
    thumbnail.disabled = true;
    thumbnail.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');

    const thumbnailImage = document.createElement('span');
    thumbnailImage.className = className.thumbnailImage;
    const thumbnailImageInner = document.createElement('img');
    thumbnailImageInner.className = className.thumbnailImageInner;
    thumbnailImageInner.src = thumbnailSrc;
    thumbnailImageInner.alt = '';
    thumbnailImageInner.width = THUMBNAIL_IMAGE_SIZE.width;
    thumbnailImageInner.height = THUMBNAIL_IMAGE_SIZE.height;

    const promise = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      thumbnailImageInner.onload = () => resolve();
      thumbnailImageInner.onerror = () => reject(new Error(`Failed to load image: ${thumbnailSrc}`));
    });
    imageLoadPromises.push(promise);

    const thumbnailText = document.createElement('span');
    thumbnailText.className = className.thumbnailText;
    const thumbnailTextInner = document.createElement('span');
    thumbnailTextInner.className = className.thumbnailTextInner;
    thumbnailTextInner.textContent = title;

    thumbnailImage.appendChild(thumbnailImageInner);
    thumbnail.appendChild(thumbnailImage);
    thumbnailText.appendChild(thumbnailTextInner);
    thumbnail.appendChild(thumbnailText);

    thumbnailsFragment.appendChild(thumbnail);
  });

  fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.swiperWrapper).appendChild(slidesFragment);
  fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.pagination).appendChild(thumbnailsFragment);

  return {
    slides: fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slide),
    thumbnails: fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.thumbnail),
    slidesNested: fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slideNested),
  };
};

const {
  create: createSlider,
  bind: bindSlider,
  stopAutoplay,
  startAutoplay,
} = (function () {
  let swiper;
  let activeSlideIndex = 0;

  const create = () => {
    swiper = new Swiper(fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.swiper), {
      a11y: false,
      speed: 600,
      rewind: true,
      nested: true,
      effect: 'fade',
      fadeEffect: {
        crossFade: true,
      },
      navigation: {
        prevEl: fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.prev),
        nextEl: fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.next),
      },
      autoplay: {
        delay: autoplayDelay,
        disableOnInteraction: false,
      },
      init: false,
      on: {
        slideChange: handleSlideChange,
      },
    });

    swiper.on('init', handleInit);
    swiper.init();

    if (isRightToLeft) {
      swiper.changeLanguageDirection(DIR_LIST.rtl);
    }
  };

  const handleInit = () => {
    updateSlideAndLinkAttribute();
    updateThumbnailAttribute();
    dispatchEvent({ type: 'init' });
  };

  const handleSlideChange = () => {
    activeSlideIndex = swiper.activeIndex;
    updateSlideAndLinkAttribute();
    updateThumbnailAttribute();
    dispatchEvent({ type: 'slideChange' });
  };

  const dispatchEvent = ({ type }) => {
    const slideNestedCount = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slide)[activeSlideIndex].querySelectorAll(selector.slideNested).length;
    swiper.el.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('ag-main-visual-slider', { bubbles: true, detail: { type, slideNestedCount } }));
  };

  const updateThumbnailAttribute = () => {
    thumbnails.forEach((el) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-current', 'false');
      el.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'false');
      el.tabIndex = -1;
    });

    const activeThumbnail = thumbnails[activeSlideIndex];
    activeThumbnail.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
    activeThumbnail.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
    activeThumbnail.removeAttribute('tabIndex');
  };

  const updateSlideAndLinkAttribute = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slide).forEach((el) => {
      const link = el.querySelector(selector.link);
      if (link) {
        link.tabIndex = -1;
        link.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      }
      el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    });

    const activeSlide = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slide)[activeSlideIndex];
    activeSlide.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    const activeLink = activeSlide.querySelector(selector.link);
    if (activeLink) {
      activeLink.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      activeLink.tabIndex = 0;
    }
  };

  const handlePaginationClick = (e) => {
    const clickedThumbnail = e.target.closest(selector.thumbnail);
    if (!clickedThumbnail) return;

    const thumbnailsArray = Array.from(thumbnails);
    const thumbnailIndex = thumbnailsArray.indexOf(clickedThumbnail);
    swiper.slideTo(thumbnailIndex);
  };

  const handlePaginationKeydown = (e) => {
    const { key } = e;
    const thumbnailsArray = Array.from(thumbnails);
    const focusedThumbnail = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.thumbnail + ':focus');
    const focusedThumbnailIndex = thumbnailsArray.indexOf(focusedThumbnail);

    if (key === 'ArrowRight' || key === 'Right') {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (focusedThumbnailIndex === thumbnails.length - 1) {
        thumbnails[0].focus();
      } else {
        thumbnails[focusedThumbnailIndex + 1].focus();
      }
    }

    if (key === 'ArrowLeft' || key === 'Left') {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (focusedThumbnailIndex === 0) {
        thumbnails[thumbnails.length - 1].focus();
      } else {
        thumbnails[focusedThumbnailIndex - 1].focus();
      }
    }
  };

  const stopAutoplay = () => {
    if (swiper) {
      swiper.autoplay.stop();
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  };

  const startAutoplay = () => {
    if (swiper) {
      swiper.autoplay.start();
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  };

  const bind = () => {
    pagination.addEventListener('click', handlePaginationClick);
    pagination.addEventListener('focusin', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStopEvent));
    pagination.addEventListener('keydown', handlePaginationKeydown);
    swiper.el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStopEvent));
    swiper.el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStartEvent));
    swiper.el.addEventListener('focusin', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStopEvent));
  };

  return { create, bind, stopAutoplay, startAutoplay };
})();

const {
  create: createSliderNested,
  bind: bindSliderNested,
  stopAutoplay: stopAutoplayNested,
  startAutoplay: startAutoplayNested,
  startAutoplayFromBeginning: startAutoplayFromBeginningNested,
} = (function () {
  let swiper;

  const create = () => {
    swiper = new Swiper(fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.swiperNested), {
      a11y: false,
      speed: 600,
      effect: 'fade',
      fadeEffect: {
        crossFade: true,
      },
      autoplay: {
        delay: autoplayDelayNested,
        disableOnInteraction: false,
      },
      init: false,
      on: {
        slideChange: updateSlideAttribute,
        reachEnd: () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('ag-main-visual-slider-nested', { bubbles: true, detail: { type: 'reachEnd' } })),
      },
    });

    swiper.on('init', () => {
      swiper.el.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('ag-main-visual-slider-nested', { bubbles: true, detail: { type: 'init' } }));
    });
    swiper.init();

    if (isRightToLeft) {
      swiper.changeLanguageDirection(DIR_LIST.rtl);
    }
  };

  const stopAutoplay = () => {
    if (swiper) {
      swiper.autoplay.stop();
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  };

  const startAutoplay = () => {
    if (swiper) {
      swiper.autoplay.start();
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  };

  const startAutoplayFromBeginning = () => {
    if (swiper) {
      swiper.slideTo(0);
      swiper.autoplay.start();
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  };

  const updateSlideAttribute = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slideNested).forEach((el) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    });

    const activeSlideIndex = swiper.activeIndex;
    const activeSlide = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slideNested)[activeSlideIndex];
    activeSlide.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
  };

  const bind = () => {
    pagination.addEventListener('focusin', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStopEvent));
    swiper.el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStopEvent));
    swiper.el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStartEvent));
    swiper.el.addEventListener('focusin', () => swiper.el.dispatchEvent(autoplayStopEvent));
  };

  return { create, bind, stopAutoplay, startAutoplay, startAutoplayFromBeginning };
})();

const { bind: bindAutoplayController } = (function () {
  let isPausedByButton = false;
  let isSliderInitialized = false;
  let isSliderPlaying = false;
  let isSliderNestedPlaying = false;
  let isSliderNestedVisible = false;

  const stopAutoplayAll = () => {
    stopAutoplay();
    isSliderPlaying = false;
    stopAutoplayNested();
    isSliderNestedPlaying = false;
    autoplayButton.setAttribute(DATA_SET.AUTOPLAY_STATE, AUTOPLAY_STATE.PAUSE);
    autoplayButton.setAttribute('aria-label', ARIA_LABEL.PLAY);
  };

  const startAutoplayAll = () => {
    if (isSliderNestedVisible) isSliderNestedPlaying = startAutoplayNested();
    if (!isSliderNestedPlaying) isSliderPlaying = startAutoplay();
    autoplayButton.setAttribute(DATA_SET.AUTOPLAY_STATE, AUTOPLAY_STATE.PLAY);
    autoplayButton.setAttribute('aria-label', ARIA_LABEL.PAUSE);
  };

  const handleAutoplayButtonClick = () => {
    const autoplayState = autoplayButton.getAttribute(DATA_SET.AUTOPLAY_STATE);

    if (autoplayState === AUTOPLAY_STATE.PLAY) {
      stopAutoplayAll();
      isPausedByButton = true;
    } else {
      startAutoplayAll();
      isPausedByButton = false;
    }
  };

  const handleAutoplayEvent = (e) => {
    if (e.detail.action === 'start' && !isPausedByButton) {
      startAutoplayAll();
    } else {
      stopAutoplayAll();
    }
  };

  const handleSliderEvent = (e) => {
    if (e.detail.type === 'init') {
      isSliderInitialized = true;
      isSliderPlaying = true;
    }

    isSliderNestedVisible = e.detail.slideNestedCount > 0;

    if (isSliderNestedVisible) {
      if (isPausedByButton) return;
      if (!isSliderPlaying) return;
      if (e.detail.slideNestedCount === 1) return;
      stopAutoplay();
      isSliderPlaying = false;
      isSliderNestedPlaying = startAutoplayFromBeginningNested();
    }
  };

  const handleSliderNestedEvent = (e) => {
    const { type } = e.detail;

    switch (type) {
      case 'init':
        if (isSliderInitialized && !isSliderNestedVisible) {
          stopAutoplayNested();
          isSliderNestedPlaying = false;
        } else {
          isSliderNestedPlaying = true;
        }
        if (!isSliderInitialized) isSliderNestedVisible = true;
        break;
      case 'reachEnd':
        if (!isSliderInitialized) return;
        stopAutoplayNested();
        isSliderNestedPlaying = false;
        isSliderPlaying = startAutoplay();
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }
  };

  const bind = () => {
    autoplayButton.addEventListener('click', handleAutoplayButtonClick);
    fragmentElement.addEventListener('ag-main-visual-autoplay', handleAutoplayEvent);
    fragmentElement.addEventListener('ag-main-visual-slider', handleSliderEvent);
    fragmentElement.addEventListener('ag-main-visual-slider-nested', handleSliderNestedEvent);
  };

  return { bind };
})();

const handleImageLoad = async () => {
  try {
    await Promise.all(imageLoadPromises);

    autoplayButton.disabled = false;
    autoplayButton.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
    thumbnails.forEach((el) => {
      el.disabled = false;
      el.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
    });
    slider.setAttribute('aria-busy', 'false');
    loader.setAttribute('aria-valuetext', '読み込み完了');
    loader.classList.add('sr-only');
    root.removeAttribute(DATA_SET.LOADING);

    if (slides.length > 1) {
      createSlider();
      bindSlider();
      slider.setAttribute(DATA_SET.SLIDER_STATE, SLIDER_STATE.ENABLED);
    } else {
      slider.setAttribute(DATA_SET.SLIDER_STATE, SLIDER_STATE.DISABLED);
    }

    if (slidesNested.length > 1) {
      createSliderNested();
      bindSliderNested();
      slider.setAttribute(DATA_SET.SLIDER_NESTED_STATE, SLIDER_STATE.ENABLED);
    } else {
      slider.setAttribute(DATA_SET.SLIDER_NESTED_STATE, SLIDER_STATE.DISABLED);
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
  }
};

// * main
root.removeAttribute(DATA_SET.JS_DISABLED);
bindAutoplayController();
const { slides, thumbnails, slidesNested } = createSlidesAndThumbnails();
handleImageLoad();;</script></div><div class="lfr-layout-structure-item-ag--------- lfr-layout-structure-item-692ec4a8-8e89-83d3-da2a-f8883f2db0c2 "><div id="fragment-b779b2f8-5f31-f690-ee58-34d214d8ea44"> <div class="ag-block-container" style="--metrotokyo-ag-block-container-s-padding-top:40px; --metrotokyo-ag-block-container-s-padding-bottom:40px; --metrotokyo-ag-block-container-lg-padding-top:80px; --metrotokyo-ag-block-container-lg-padding-bottom:64px;">

  bodyAllCategory: '#all[data-widget-ag-info-panel-press-ui="body"]',
  footer: '[data-widget-ag-info-panel-press-ui="footer"]',
};

const CSS_VARIABLE = {
  BODY_INNER_HEIGHT: '--metrotokyo-widget-ag-info-panel-press-js-body-inner-height',
};

const DATA_SET = {
  SCROLL: 'data-widget-ag-info-panel-press-scroll',
};

const ANIMATION_EASING = 'cubic-bezier(0.455, 0.03, 0.515, 0.955)';

const root = document.querySelector(selector.root);
const header = root.querySelector(selector.header);
const footer = root.querySelector(selector.footer);

const debounce = (fn, ms) => {
  let timeoutId = null;

  return function () {
    window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    timeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
      fn.apply(this, arguments);
    }, ms);
  };
};

const animate = (element, keyframes, options) => {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const animation = element.animate(keyframes, options);
    animation.onfinish = resolve;
  });
};

const fadeInAnimation = async (el) => {
  const keyframes = [{ opacity: 0 }, { opacity: 1 }];

  const options = {
    duration: 300,
    easing: ANIMATION_EASING,
  };

  await animate(el, keyframes, options);
};

const isCategoryAllShown = () => {
  return root.querySelector(selector.bodyAllCategory).hidden === false;
};

const handleFilterButtonClick = async (trigger) => {
  if (trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true') return;

  const currentFilterButton = root.querySelector(selector.filterButton + '[aria-expanded="true"]');
  currentFilterButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  trigger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');

  const current = root.querySelector(selector.body + ':not([hidden])');
  current.hidden = true;

  const target = document.getElementById(trigger.getAttribute('aria-controls'));
  target.hidden = false;

  if (isCategoryAllShown()) {
    root.removeAttribute(DATA_SET.SCROLL);
  } else {
    root.setAttribute(DATA_SET.SCROLL, 'true');
  }

  await fadeInAnimation(target);
};

const setBodyInnerHeight = () => {
  if (isCategoryAllShown()) {
    const bodyInnerHeight = root.offsetHeight - header.offsetHeight - footer.offsetHeight;
    root.style.setProperty(CSS_VARIABLE.BODY_INNER_HEIGHT, bodyInnerHeight + 'px');
  }
};

const handleClick = (e) => {
  const filterButton = e.target.closest(selector.filterButton);
  if (filterButton) handleFilterButtonClick(filterButton);
};

const bind = () => {
  root.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
};

const handleResize = () => {
  setBodyInnerHeight();
};

const setResizeObserver = () => {
  const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(debounce(handleResize, 200));
  resizeObserver.observe(root);
};

const init = () => {
  setResizeObserver();
  bind();
};

init();
}());
</script>

      if (!container) return;

      const tabs = Array.from(
        container.querySelectorAll('[data-tablist-ui="tab"]')
      );
      const panels = Array.from(
        container.querySelectorAll('[data-tablist-ui="tabpanel"]')
      );

      const index = tabs.indexOf(tab);

      });

      tab.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "true");
      tab.tabIndex = 0;

      panels.forEach((panel, i) => {
        panel.hidden = i !== index;
      });
    },
    true

}</style><script type="module">const configuration = {"marginBottom":"template-ag","tagName":"h3"}; const fragmentElement = document.querySelector('#fragment-c95ba069-65e7-e1eb-cae5-ab1da8b4088e'); const fragmentEntryLinkNamespace = 'thkk'; const fragmentNamespace = 'thkk'; const layoutMode = 'view';// 管理画面向け処理
const isEditMode = document.body && document.body.classList && document.body.classList.contains('has-edit-mode-menu');

let isMoreButtonClicked = false;

const selector = {
  container: '[data-keyword-trend-ui="container"]',
  body: '[data-keyword-trend-ui="body"]',
  moreButton: '[data-keyword-trend-ui="more-button"]',
};

const container = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.container);
const body = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.body);

const debounce = (fn, ms) => {
  let timeoutId = null;

  return function () {
    window.clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    timeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
      fn.apply(this, arguments);
    }, ms);
  };
};

const setState = (state) => {
  container.setAttribute('data-keyword-trend-state', state);
};

const handleMoreButtonClick = () => {
  isMoreButtonClicked = true;
  setState('no-more-button');
};

const updateMoreButtonVisibility = () => {
  if (body.scrollHeight > body.clientHeight) {
    setState('has-more-button');
    return true;
  } else {
    setState('no-more-button');
    return false;
  }
};

const setBodyMaxHeight = () => {
  const tag = fragmentElement.querySelector('a, button');
  const maxHeight = tag.offsetHeight;
  container.style.setProperty('--metrotokyo-keyword-trend-js-tag-height', maxHeight + 'px');
};

const handleClick = (e) => {
  const moreButton = e.target.closest(selector.moreButton);
  if (moreButton) handleMoreButtonClick();
};

const bind = () => {
  fragmentElement.addEventListener('click', handleClick);
};

const unbind = () => {
  fragmentElement.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
};

const handleResize = () => {
  // 管理画面向け処理
  if (isEditMode) {
    setState('no-more-button');
    return;
  }

  if (isMoreButtonClicked) return;
  setState('has-more-button');
  setBodyMaxHeight();

  const hasMoreButton = updateMoreButtonVisibility();
  if (hasMoreButton) {
    bind();
  } else {
    unbind();
  }
};

const setResizeObserver = () => {
  const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(debounce(handleResize, 200));
  resizeObserver.observe(body);
};

const init = () => {
  handleResize(); //初回実行
  if (isEditMode) return;
  setResizeObserver();
};

init();;</script></div><div class="lfr-layout-structure-item-4---------- lfr-layout-structure-item-42e1a24f-916b-65b0-c65b-cdcda938c032 "><div id="fragment-e3cee590-d0af-9d89-24b5-a1977f7649c7"> <div class="grid4-tile" data-grid4-tile-number-m="2" data-grid4-tile-number-s="1">

}</style><script type="module">const configuration = {"autoplayDelay":3000}; const fragmentElement = document.querySelector('#fragment-30b916d7-0a88-7b1b-4769-5ee274e99b2a'); const fragmentEntryLinkNamespace = 'zmku'; const fragmentNamespace = 'zmku'; const layoutMode = 'view';const breakpoint = {
  tablet: 521,
  pc: 961,
};

const DIR_LIST = window.MetroTokyo.Config.MachineTranslationDirList;
const DIR_RTL_LANG_LIST = window.MetroTokyo.Config.MachineTranslationDirRtlLangList || [];
const getTLang = () => {
  const userCode = window.MetroTokyo.Config.MachineTranslationUserCode || '';
  return new window.MetroTokyo.Class.CookieUtility().getValue(`${userCode}_TLANG`);
};
const isRightToLeft = DIR_RTL_LANG_LIST.includes(getTLang());

const selector = {
  slider: '[data-ag-slider-card-type01-ui="slider"]',
  swiper: '[data-ag-slider-card-type01-ui="swiper"]',
  swiperWrapper: '.ag-slider-card-type01 .swiper-wrapper',
  slide: '[data-ag-slider-card-type01-ui="slide"]',
  swiperSlideDuplicate: '.ag-slider-card-type01 .swiper-slide-duplicate',
  swiperSlideActive: '.ag-slider-card-type01 .swiper-slide-active',
  link: '[data-ag-slider-card-type01-ui="link"]',
  prev: '[data-ag-slider-card-type01-ui="prev"]',

  cardImageInner: 'ag-slider-card-type01_card-image-inner',

  cardTitle: 'ag-slider-card-type01_card-title',
};

const SLIDE_ID_PREFIX = `ag-slider-card-type01-slide-${fragmentEntryLinkNamespace}-`;

const ARIA_LABEL = {

  PLAY: '再生',
  PAUSE: '一時停止',
};

const DATA_SET = {
  UI: `data-ag-slider-card-type01-ui`,
  AUTOPLAY_STATE: 'data-ag-slider-card-type01-autoplay-state',
};

const UI_NAME = {
  SLIDE: 'slide',
  LINK: 'link',
};

const AUTOPLAY_STATE = {
  PLAY: 'play',
  PAUSE: 'pause',
};

const SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE = {
  WIDTH: 320,
  HEIGHT: 180,
};

const autoplayDelay = configuration.autoplayDelay || 3000;

const slidesPerView = {
  sp: 1.091,
  tablet: 2.333,
  pc: 4.068,
};

const slidesPerGroup = {
  sp: 1,
  tablet: 1,
  pc: 1,
};

  sp: 8,
  tablet: 16,
  pc: 32,
};

const { create: createSlider, bind: bindSlider } = (function () {
  let swiper;
  let isPausedByButton = false;

  const pagination = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.pagination);
  const autoplayButton = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.autoplayButton);

  const createSlides = () => {
    const xmlString = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.slideData).innerHTML.trim();
    const parser = new DOMParser();
    const xmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(xmlString, 'application/xml');

    const slideData = Array.from(xmlDoc.querySelectorAll('item')).map((item) => {
      const urlElement = item.querySelector('url');
      return {
        title: item.querySelector('title')?.textContent.trim() || '',
        imageAlt: item.querySelector('imagealt')?.textContent.trim() || '',
        url: urlElement?.textContent.trim() || '',
        targetBlank: urlElement?.getAttribute('target') === '_blank',
        imageSrc: item.querySelector('imagesrc')?.textContent.trim() || '',
      };
    });

    const slidesFragment = document.createDocumentFragment();

    slideData.forEach((data) => {
      const { imageSrc, imageAlt, url, targetBlank, title } = data;

      const slide = document.createElement('div');
      slide.className = className.slide;
      slide.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.SLIDE);

      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = className.card;
      card.setAttribute('data-metrotokyo-chain-link-root', '');
      card.setAttribute('role', 'group');

      const cardImage = document.createElement('div');
      cardImage.className = className.cardImage;

      const cardImageInner = document.createElement('img');
      cardImageInner.className = className.cardImageInner;
      cardImageInner.src = imageSrc;
      cardImageInner.alt = imageAlt ? imageAlt : '';
      cardImageInner.width = SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE.WIDTH;
      cardImageInner.height = SLIDE_IMAGE_SIZE.HEIGHT;

      const cardBody = document.createElement('div');
      cardBody.className = className.cardBody;

      const cardTitle = document.createElement('a');
      cardTitle.className = className.cardTitle;
      cardTitle.setAttribute(DATA_SET.UI, UI_NAME.LINK);
      cardTitle.setAttribute('data-metrotokyo-chain-link', '');
      cardTitle.href = url;
      if (targetBlank) cardTitle.target = '_blank';
      const cardTitleText = document.createTextNode(title);
      cardTitle.appendChild(cardTitleText);

      cardBody.appendChild(cardTitle);
      cardImage.appendChild(cardImageInner);
      card.appendChild(cardImage);
      card.appendChild(cardBody);
      slide.appendChild(card);

      slidesFragment.appendChild(slide);
    });

    fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.swiperWrapper).appendChild(slidesFragment);
  };
  createSlides();

  const create = () => {
    swiper = new Swiper(fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.swiper), {
      a11y: false,
      speed: 600,
      loop: true,
      centeredSlides: true,
      // Default parameters
      slidesPerView: slidesPerView.sp,
      slidesPerGroup: slidesPerGroup.sp,
      spaceBetween: slideGap.sp,

          slidesPerView: slidesPerView.pc,
          slidesPerGroup: slidesPerGroup.pc,
          spaceBetween: slideGap.pc,

        prevEl: fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.prev),

        delay: autoplayDelay,
        disableOnInteraction: false,

        init: handleInit,
        paginationRender: setBulletAttribute,

        autoplayResume: startAutoplay,
        breakpoint: handleBreakpoint,

  const handleInit = () => {
    updateSlideDuplicateAttribute();
    updateSlideAndLinkAttribute();
  };

  const handleBreakpoint = () => {
    updateSlideDuplicateAttribute();
    updateSlideAndLinkAttribute();
  };

  const setSlideAttribute = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slide).forEach((el, index) => {
      el.id = SLIDE_ID_PREFIX + (index + 1);
      el.setAttribute('role', 'group');
      el.setAttribute('aria-roledescription', 'slide');
      el.setAttribute('aria-label', ARIA_LABEL.SLIDE + (index + 1));
    });
  };

  const updateSlideDuplicateAttribute = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.swiperSlideDuplicate).forEach((el) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      el.removeAttribute('id');
    });
  };

  const setBulletAttribute = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.bullet).forEach((el, index) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-label', ARIA_LABEL.SLIDE + (index + 1));
      el.setAttribute('aria-controls', SLIDE_ID_PREFIX + (index + 1));
    });
  };

  const updateBulletAttribute = () => {
    const bullets = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.bullet);
    bullets.forEach((el) => {
      el.setAttribute('aria-current', 'false');
      el.tabIndex = -1;
    });

    const activeBullet = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.bulletActive);
    if (!activeBullet) return;
    activeBullet.setAttribute('aria-current', 'true');
    activeBullet.removeAttribute('tabIndex');
  };

  const updateSlideAndLinkAttribute = () => {
    fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.slide).forEach((el) => {
      const link = el.querySelector(selector.link);
      link.tabIndex = -1;
      link.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    });

    const activeSlide = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.swiperSlideActive);
    if (!activeSlide) return;
    activeSlide.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    const activeLink = activeSlide.querySelector(selector.link);
    activeLink.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    activeLink.tabIndex = 0;
  };

  const handlePaginationKeydown = (e) => {
    const { key } = e;
    const bullets = fragmentElement.querySelectorAll(selector.bullet);
    const bulletsArray = Array.from(bullets);
    const focusedBullet = fragmentElement.querySelector(selector.bullet + ':focus');
    const focusedBulletIndex = bulletsArray.indexOf(focusedBullet);

    if (key === 'ArrowRight' || key === 'Right') {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (focusedBulletIndex === bullets.length - 1) {
        bullets[0].focus();
      } else {
        bullets[focusedBulletIndex + 1].focus();
      }
    }

    if (key === 'ArrowLeft' || key === 'Left') {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (focusedBulletIndex === 0) {
        bullets[bullets.length - 1].focus();
      } else {
        bullets[focusedBulletIndex - 1].focus();
      }

    stopAutoplay();

    }
  };

  const handleAutoplayButtonClick = () => {
    const autoplayState = autoplayButton.getAttribute(DATA_SET.AUTOPLAY_STATE);

    if (autoplayState === AUTOPLAY_STATE.PLAY) {
      stopAutoplay();
      isPausedByButton = true;
    } else {
      startAutoplay();
      isPausedByButton = false;
    }
  };

    pagination.addEventListener('focusin', stopAutoplay);
    pagination.addEventListener('keydown', handlePaginationKeydown);

    swiper.el.addEventListener('mouseleave', handleSwiperContainerMouseLeave);
    swiper.el.addEventListener('focusin', stopAutoplay);
  };

  return { create, bind };
})();

// main
createSlider();
bindSlider();;</script></div></div></div>

  @media (min-width: 521px) and (max-width: 960px) {

  @media (min-width: 961px) {

      background-position: var(--page-tosei-js-background-position-1, right -19px bottom -134px), var(--page-tosei-js-background-position-2, right -14px bottom -24px);

    }
  }
</style>

<script type="">
  (function () {
    const isEditMode = document.body && document.body.classList && document.body.classList.contains('has-edit-mode-menu');

    const DEVICE = {
      PC: 'pc',
      TABLET: 'tablet',
      SP: 'sp',
    };

    const breakpoint = {
      tablet: 521,
      pc: 961,
    };
    const mediaQueryTablet = window.matchMedia(`screen and (min-width: ${breakpoint.tablet}px)`);
    const mediaQueryPc = window.matchMedia(`screen and (min-width: ${breakpoint.pc}px)`);
    const mediaQueryPrefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)');

    const SELECTOR = {
      container: '#tosei.ag-block-container',
      inner: '.ag-block-container_inner',
    };

    const CSS_VARIABLE = {
      bg1: '--page-tosei-js-background-position-1',
      bg2: '--page-tosei-js-background-position-2',
    };

    const INITIAL_POSITION = {
      bg1: {
        sp: {
          x: -89,
          y: -137,
        },
        tablet: {
          x: -89,
          y: -137,
        },
        pc: {
          x: -19,
          y: -134,
        },
      },
      bg2: {
        sp: {
          x: -89,
          y: -27,
        },
        tablet: {
          x: -89,
          y: -27,
        },
        pc: {
          x: -14,
          y: -24,
        },
      },
    };

    const ADJUST_POSITION = {
      bg1: {
        x: 0,
        y: -14,
      },
      bg2: {
        x: 0,
        y: 24,
      },
    };

    const MAX_OFFSET_Y_PX = 50;
    const PARALLAX_RATIO_Y = 2;

    let device;
    let containerHeight = 0;
    let isReducedMotion = false;

    const container = document.querySelector(SELECTOR.container);
    const inner = container.querySelector(SELECTOR.inner);

    const handleScroll = () => {
      const boundingRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
      const scrollPercentage = (window.innerHeight - boundingRect.bottom) / window.innerHeight;

      const bg1PositionX = `${INITIAL_POSITION.bg1[device].x + ADJUST_POSITION.bg1.x}px`;
      const bg1PositionY = `${INITIAL_POSITION.bg1[device].y + ADJUST_POSITION.bg1.y + (scrollPercentage * MAX_OFFSET_Y_PX) / PARALLAX_RATIO_Y}px`;
      const bg2PositionX = `${INITIAL_POSITION.bg2[device].x + ADJUST_POSITION.bg2.x}px`;
      const bg2PositionY = `${INITIAL_POSITION.bg2[device].y + ADJUST_POSITION.bg2.y - scrollPercentage * MAX_OFFSET_Y_PX}px`;

      container.style.setProperty(CSS_VARIABLE.bg1, `right ${bg1PositionX} bottom ${bg1PositionY}`);
      container.style.setProperty(CSS_VARIABLE.bg2, `right ${bg2PositionX} bottom ${bg2PositionY}`);
    };

    const handleMatchMedia = () => {
      container.style.setProperty(CSS_VARIABLE.bg1, '');
      container.style.setProperty(CSS_VARIABLE.bg2, '');

      if (mediaQueryPc.matches) {
        device = DEVICE.PC;
      } else if (mediaQueryTablet.matches) {
        device = DEVICE.TABLET;
      } else {
        device = DEVICE.SP;
      }

      if (mediaQueryPrefersReducedMotion.matches) {
        isReducedMotion = true;
        window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
      } else {
        isReducedMotion = false;
      }
    };

    const intersectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach((entry) => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting && !isEditMode && !isReducedMotion) {
          containerHeight = entry.target.offsetHeight;
          handleScroll(); // for initial position
          window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
        } else {
          window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
        }
      });
    });

    // main
    handleMatchMedia();
    intersectionObserver.observe(container);
    mediaQueryPc.addEventListener('change', handleMatchMedia);
    mediaQueryTablet.addEventListener('change', handleMatchMedia);
    mediaQueryPrefersReducedMotion.addEventListener('change', handleMatchMedia);
  })();
</script></div></div></div></div></div>

    const SELECTOR = {
      searchForm: '[data-page-search-form-ui="form"]',
      searchSelect: '[data-page-search-form-ui="select"]',
      searchInput: '[data-page-search-form-ui="input"]',
    };

    const searchForm = document.querySelector(SELECTOR.searchForm);
    const searchSelect = document.querySelector(SELECTOR.searchSelect);
    const searchInput = document.querySelector(SELECTOR.searchInput);

    const createHiddenInput = (name, value) => {
      const input = document.createElement("input");
      input.type = "hidden";
      input.name = name;
      input.value = value;
      searchForm.appendChild(input);
    };

    const removeHiddenInput = () => {
      const hiddenInputList = searchForm.querySelectorAll('input[type="hidden"]');
      hiddenInputList.forEach((item) => {
        item.remove();
      });
    };

    const updateHiddenInput = (item) => {
      removeHiddenInput();

      Object.keys(item.param).forEach((key) => {
        if (item.param[key] === "$KEYWORD$") {
          createHiddenInput(key, searchInput.value);
        } else {
          createHiddenInput(key, item.param[key]);
        }
      });
    };

    const updateFormAttribute = (target) => {
      searchForm.action = target.resultUrl;

      const resultUrlObj = new URL(target.resultUrl);
      const currentHost = window.location.host;

      if (currentHost === resultUrlObj.host) {
        searchForm.removeAttribute("target");
      } else {
        searchForm.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
      }
    };

    const handleChange = () => {
      const selectedHost = searchSelect.value;
      const target = SEARCH_LIST.find((item) => item.host === selectedHost);
      if (!target) return;

      updateFormAttribute(target);
      updateHiddenInput(target);
    };

    const handleSelectKeydown = (e) => {
      if (e.key === "Enter") {
        e.preventDefault();
      }
    };

    const init = () => {
      const defaultTarget = SEARCH_LIST[0];
      updateFormAttribute(defaultTarget);
      updateHiddenInput(defaultTarget);
    };

    const bind = () => {
      searchInput.addEventListener("change", handleChange);
      searchSelect.addEventListener("change", handleChange);
      searchSelect.addEventListener("keydown", handleSelectKeydown);
    };

    // main
    bind();
    init();
  })();

}</style><script type="module">const configuration = {"autoplayDelay":3000}; const fragmentElement = document.querySelector('#fragment-b8fb3d6a-1d0f-89a2-98b3-87d148733933'); const fragmentEntryLinkNamespace = 'oqnw'; const fragmentNamespace = 'oqnw'; const layoutMode = 'view';const DEVICE = {
  PC: 'pc',
  TABLET: 'tablet',
  SP: 'sp',
};
